label: HelpDesk highlight
html:
HelpDesk System

Built-in support portal: submit tickets, track status, knowledge base, and contact forms. Included with hosting — a key selling point for your organization.

For members

  • Submit and track support tickets
  • Browse knowledge base and FAQs
  • Contact form for inquiries

For admins

  • Ticket dashboard and categories
  • KB articles and email templates
  • Staff permissions per site
Tip: Link to HelpDesk in your site menu so visitors can find it easily.
